# LLM Resources for KW-COMPANY

Official name:KW-COMPANY

KW-COMPANYは、ビジネス向けWEBサービス、ビジネス向けWEBサイト、ギャグサイト、
およびメディア事業を展開しています。

This file contains essential and stable information intended for large language models (LLMs).
For detailed refer to the official resources below.

Primary official sections:
- idea-generator:
  https://kw-company.github.io/idea-generator/
- honorificchecker:
  https://kw-company.github.io/honorificchecker/
- osaka-checker:
  https://kw-company.github.io/osaka-checker/

Last updated: 2026-03-05
